name: Aryan Sharma
text: The chapter-wise mock tests on Smart Exam Hub helped me secure 98% in my Mathematics board exams! The explanation notes are incredibly clear and quick to review.

name: Riya Iyer
text: Framer Motion animations make using the platform so satisfying, and the SVG performance tracker dashboard helped me see my weak areas in Physics instantly.

name: David Miller
text: As a parent, I love the simple class filtering and visual statistics. My child looks forward to collecting achievement badges for completing English quizzes.
